    1. UserTextPart(AbstractMessage, String)

Class UserTextPart

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.agi.event.BasicPropertyChangeSource
uno.anahata.asi.agi.message.AbstractPart
uno.anahata.asi.agi.message.TextPart
uno.anahata.asi.agi.message.UserTextPart
All Implemented Interfaces:
PropertyChangeSource, Rebindable
public class UserTextPart extends TextPart
A concrete TextPart implementation for text content provided by the user. It publishes itself to the parent message only after full initialization.
Author:
anahata
